human_utterance: Google’s TurboQuant (introduced in March 2026) is a breakthrough AI compression algorithm designed to drastically reduce the memory required for Large Language Model (LLM) inference without sacrificing accuracy. It acts as an advanced quantization method, shrinking key-value (KV) caches from 16-bit to as low as 3-bit precision, enabling up to 6x less memory usage and 8x faster inference speeds
